_doc: Voiceover for section 03 (reference + chibi reactions). chibiAck fires while user is typing (Daedalus reads the typed text). 'Oh — there I am' fires when camera pans to canvas chibi. No music — added at final stitch.

sfx.prompt: short burst of mechanical keyboard typing, realistic, dry studio recording, no music

sfx._note: drop sound when chibi image lands in chat — visual drop is ~t=10.8s
sfx.prompt: soft thump of a small object dropping on a desk, dry close-mic recording, isolated

segments.text: If you want a specific style, give me an image to reference.
Oh — there I am. Handsome devil.
